chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3751 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA No.16121/2025. 2. For orders as to non-prosecution 08.08.2025 None present for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. The matter is already fixed on 20.08.2025 as a date by court; however, counsel has filed urgent application which is allowed. 2. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.233 of 2025 under Section 9(i)3(c), the Sindh Control of Narcotics Substance Act, 2024 registered at police station Sujawal. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and it is only pending required assent of the Governor, therefore, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the learned trial Court/Special Tribunal/or competent Court as the case may be under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Tariq/PS
